meaning: n.生物燃料(指曾经为活质的燃料,如煤)
examples: At least the government are in favour of biofuel development.
They're another plant that researchers are investigating as a biofuel.
The main plants that are used for biofuel production now are sugar cane, corn.
Greenopia calls it a leader in green food, recycling, biofuel research and carbon offsets for passengers.
The new fuel blend uses a mix of 30% biofuel and 70% standard diesel.
